content:
When people say Artificial Intelligence (AI) is a threat, I do not agree with them. I do believe that everyone have their own reserves that to what point or aspect do people think and imagine about AI. In my point of view, I view AI as a positive thing and one of the best things ever happened in the tech world till date.

2 min read
Just now

--

If people see and think about AI calm-mindedly they will figure out and believe me AI is not a threat to human career or to them. Infact, AI has increased the jobs to a huge extent and numbers. Artificial Intelligence has made the lives of people who are already employeed or hunting jobs very very simpler and easier. AI has decreased the workload of people to a huge extent. Now people work smartly instead of putting in hours and hours of effort in their jobs, and most of the times not achieving their final results or end up delaying or not achieving their given tasks on time. People used to stay stressed due to their work which was difficult for them to do it easily without any problem or hesitation.
AI has made it so much easier to find and hunt jobs. There are many AI job portals where the candidate just needs to upload their resume, and the applications and portals will show the best fit job roles for them according to thier resume. Like this people will not have to spend days and days for finding the perfect job roles for them according to their resumes and experiences. In easy words, that AI job application and portal will apply the job for them. A lot of hard work and most importantly the time of the person will be saved. People can spend and utilise that time in doing something more important and useful instead of wasting a lot of time in finding and applying jobs or even at their work. People can multi-task and trust me that is way way better. Everyone can stay relaxed like this and save their energy. People will enjoy their work and time as compared to feeling it as a burden.
Nowadays or in near future, anyone who avoids AI will become a threat for themselves and it will be difficult for them to progress. AI cannot be ignored and avoided. I never say to rely completely on AI but a person should be that much literate that they know when, where and how to use the AI for their career and in their daily life.
Soon a time is coming when there will be more lot than Artificial Intelligence and there will be Super Intelligence. Great minds and companies have already started reasearching and working on Super Intelligence.
In the end, as I started thinking and writing this article I will stick with my point and request people to study about AI and AI is beneficial and is not a threat to human career.
#AI #ArtificialIntelligence #FutureOfWork #Sucess
